name: DDNS Updater
longDescription:
DDNS Updater is a self-hosted container that periodically updates DNS records with the current public IP address. It keeps your domain pointing at home even when your ISP changes your IP.

Supports 55+ DNS providers including Cloudflare, Namecheap, GoDaddy, DuckDNS, OVH, Route53, Gandi, Porkbun, and Hetzner. Includes a web UI to view update status and history, plus notifications via Shoutrrr.
description: Update DNS records periodically with a WebUI for 55+ DNS providers.
